import os, subprocess
os.makedirs('checkpoints', exist_ok=True)
# diverse hyperparams
configs = [
    (10, 96, 200, 0.4, 2e-3),
    (11, 128, 256, 0.5, 2e-3),
    (12, 160, 200, 0.4, 1.5e-3),
    (13, 128, 150, 0.3, 2e-3),
    (14, 128, 200, 0.5, 2e-3),
    (15, 100, 220, 0.4, 2e-3),
    (16, 128, 200, 0.35, 2.5e-3),
    (17, 144, 180, 0.45, 2e-3),
    (18, 128, 240, 0.4, 1.8e-3),
    (19, 112, 200, 0.4, 2e-3),
]
for seed, ed, hd, dp, lr in configs:
    out = f'checkpoints/seed{seed}.pt'
    print(f'training {out}')
    subprocess.run(['python','train_div.py',str(seed),out,str(ed),str(hd),str(dp),str(lr)], check=True)
